Document:
# Standard Operating Procedure
These are sets of regulations and polices used by GOVFOR/OPFOR and all relevant military factions.
\nFailure to follow the Standard Operating Procedure may result in [bold]Failure to Follow Procedure[/bold] charges under the [textlink="UCMJ" link="AU14UCMJ"].
## Categories - [textlink="Command" link="AU14SOPCommand"] - [textlink="Rank Structure" link="AU14SOPRankStructure"] - [textlink="Rules of Engagement" link="AU14SOPRulesofEngagement"] - [textlink="Equipment and Personnel" link="AU14SOPEquipmentAndPersonnel"] - [textlink="Deployment" link="AU14SOPDeployment"] - [textlink="Dropships and Aircraft" link="AU14SOPDropshipsandAircraft"] - [textlink="Third-Party Regulations" link="AU14SOPThirdParty"] - [textlink="Definitions and Glossary" link="AU14UCMJDefinitionsandGlossary"] - [textlink="Vehicles" link="AU14SOPVehicles"]
